title: quantum-ml-comparator: quantum vs classical ML benchmarking with automatic algorithm recommendations
description: A general-purpose Python framework for comparing quantum machine learning algorithms against classical ML baselines. Includes a QML algorithm recommender that suggests quantum counterparts for common classical algorithms (SVM, MLP, Random Forest, Logistic Regression, k-NN, XGBoost, Naive Bayes, PCA), a VQE runner for molecular benchmarks (H2, LiH, H2O), and head-to-head comparison tooling.
